source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, a set of triangular boards are stacked together as depicted. What is the degree measure of $\angle \alpha$ in the figure?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} As shown in the figure,\\
$\because$ $\angle DBC = 90^\circ$ and $\angle C = 45^\circ$ and $\angle A = 30^\circ$,\\
$\therefore$ $\angle BDC = 90^\circ - \angle C = 45^\circ$,\\
$\therefore$ $\angle ADE = \angle BDC = 45^\circ$,\\
$\therefore$ $\angle \alpha = \angle A + \angle ADE = 30^\circ + 45^\circ = \boxed{75^\circ}$.
